name_cn:
Chanel 24P mini Denim Trash Bag
Size: 20x19x6(cm)
22bag mini | It's denim season again. The new 24bag denim mini has really won me over! White topstitching and blue denim are a fashion statement SOS. Matching color chain and silver hardware are casual yet refined~
The bag capacity is completely sufficient! Super surprising~
Seeing this mini, I can't wait for summer~
Style No. AS3980
